task_prompt: Run all R scripts in the 'code' folder
tasks: From Table 2 results, what is the estimated effect of the Listening + Persuasion condition relative to placebo on policy attitudes toward undocumented immigrants at T1 (immediately post-conversation)? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.

From Table 2 results, what is the estimated effect of the Persuasive Appeal Only condition relative to placebo on policy attitudes toward undocumented immigrants at T1 (immediately post-conversation)? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.

From Figure 1 and Table 2 results, what is the estimated effect of the Listening + Persuasion condition relative to the Persuasive Appeal Only condition on policy attitudes immediately post-conversation? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.

Is the effect of the Listening + Persuasion condition relative to the Persuasive Appeal Only condition on prejudice toward undocumented immigrants statistically significant at p < 0.05 at the 5-week follow-up? Report only Yes or No.
